assertions.title: Docker-based runner creates and executes a container for each task

steps.observed: 44 passed in 18.46s

steps.expected: Docker container created from configured image via Docker API
steps.observed: PASS — mock asserts containers.create called once, container_id stored

steps.action: Verify container execution: test_execute_simple_command, test_execute_captures_stderr, test_execute_nonzero_exit_code
steps.expected: Commands execute inside container, stdout/stderr captured, exit code returned
steps.observed: PASS — echo hello produces 'hello', stderr captured separately, exit 42 returns code 42

steps.action: Verify result returned as TaskResult: test_run_task_success, test_run_task_failure
steps.expected: run_task returns TaskResult with status and score
steps.observed: PASS — SUCCESS with score=1.0 for passing command; FAILURE/ERROR for exit 1

steps.expected: cleanup() removes Docker container, subsequent get() raises NotFound
steps.observed: PASS — container.get(container_id) raises exception after cleanup

assertions.title: Docker runner injects artifacts and agent config into container

steps.action: test_artifacts_at_custom_workspace_path: inject test.txt at custom workspace /custom-workspace
steps.observed: PASS — cat /custom-workspace/test.txt returns 'content'

steps.expected: No error, artifacts injected during prepare
steps.observed: PASS — prepare and cleanup complete without errors

PASS — result.status == TaskStatus.TIMEOUT

assertions.title: Docker runner cleans up containers on success and failure

steps.observed: PASS — containers.get raises exception, container removed
PASS — cleanup() completes without error

PASS — no exception raised
PASS — volumes.get raises exception, volume removed

steps.action: Verify DockerDaemonError message is clear and actionable
steps.expected: Error message mentions Docker daemon and suggests starting it
steps.observed: PASS — 'Docker daemon is not available: {message}. Please ensure Docker is installed and running.'

assertions.title: Environment handles missing Docker images gracefully

steps.expected: No error, image found or auto-pulled
steps.observed: PASS — completes without error
PASS — completes without error
PASS — raises DockerImageError matching 'nonexistent-image'
PASS — DockerImageError message contains 'docker pull nonexistent-img'

steps.action: Verify DockerImageError includes image name and pull command
steps.expected: Error message structured with actionable guidance
steps.observed: PASS — 'Docker image 'X' is not available: Y. Run 'docker pull X' to download it.'

summary: Tested 6 assertions across 44 pytest tests: all 6 passed (VAL-HARNESS-02, VAL-HARNESS-03, VAL-HARNESS-04, VAL-HARNESS-05, VAL-ENV-05, VAL-ENV-07). Tests cover container creation/removal, artifact injection with directory structure preservation, resource limits (CPU, memory, timeout), timeout enforcement with partial output capture, cleanup on all outcomes (success/failure/timeout), keep_workspace_on_failure volume preservation, Docker daemon availability check with clear error messages, and missing image handling with auto-pull and actionable error suggestions.
